title: setaria lutescens var. longispica
intro: Setaria lutescens var. longispica, also known as the yellow foxtail, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Setaria lutescens var. longispica include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Setaria lutescens var. longispica is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
